topic: How a multi-branch operation manages payroll for four locations from one screen
format: Open with a SmartPro Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
Four separate payroll runs. Four WPS submissions. Four chances to miss a deadline — all handled by one finance manager, from a single screen.

Not a pitch. That's what SmartPro Hub customers running multi-location operations in Oman actually do every month.

Here's how it works in practice:

Each branch carries its own employee roster, leave balances, and WPS submission. Without the right setup, that's four spreadsheets, four bank files, and four deadlines to track manually.

With SmartPro Hub, the finance manager moves between locations inside the same dashboard. One payroll cycle. Direct bank integration. WPS submissions go out from the same screen where she approved leave requests that morning.

No consolidation step. No file transfers. No calls to branch admin asking "did you send me the hours?"

We built this because multi-branch businesses in Oman weren't struggling with payroll math — they were drowning in coordination. Different problem. Different fix.

Starts at OMR 25/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

If you're managing more than one location and still reconciling payroll by hand — how many hours does that eat up each month?

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
